This bill will help rural patients not only in West Tennessee, but across the country by expanding access to the high-quality care they https://t.co/HlFDRvOlEp

I had the opportunity to meet with former North Carolina Congressman Heath Shuler and Principal Chief Michell Hicks of the Eastern Band of Cherokee Indians.

Thank you for taking the time to meet with me and discuss the work the Eastern Band of Cherokee Indians is doing. https://t.co/jbwyTSYc68

I joined @NicholeBerlie on @NewsNation to discuss @POTUS’s address to the nation tonight.

I am hopeful that he addresses the issues that matter most to Americans, including election security and our military operations against Iran. https://t.co/y5rewsv2Sz

The Iranian regime continues to pose a serious risk to our national security. 

It’s Congress’s job to ensure our Commander-in-Chief and our brave men and women in uniform have every tool and resource they need to protect America. 

Thank you to @marc_lotter & @Newsmax for having https://t.co/OyzAfFpyBC

Today I received the @NRFnews 2026 Hero of Main Street Award! 

I will continue supporting policies that boost businesses and help Main Street thrive! 🇺🇸 🛍️ https://t.co/oxLWb2wjwM

🚨 Bill PASSED out of committee: My bill, the Rural Patient Monitoring Access Act has passed out of the @WaysandMeansGOP committee with bipartisan support.

This legislation expands access to remote patient monitoring services for Medicare patients in rural and underserved https://t.co/N3gfkWIxlr

I joined @MarkieMartin on @NewsNation to discuss the future of the Republican Party and the Democratic Party.

@HouseGOP is delivering results by cutting taxes and unleashing American energy. Meanwhile, Democrats continue to promote policies that Americans reject. https://t.co/MtvCodUOfU

Two years ago today in Butler, Pennsylvania, an assassination attempt on President Donald Trump shocked the country, and Corey Comperatore lost his life protecting his family.

That tragic day serves as a reminder that political violence has absolutely no place in our country. https://t.co/tdCGyYT9Ez

I visited with @AgriCenter_Intl President John Butler, Tennessee Farm Bureau Regional Field Director Matt Fennel, Fayette County farmer Willie German, and Helena Products Group General Manager Patrick Ewan in Shelby County. 

While I was there, I toured the Helena research https://t.co/4j82gdoqbC

Shane has flown 2,366 missions, and Eric has flown 2,553 missions. Together, they have helped save countless lives.

I was pleased to present the team with an American flag flown over the U.S. Capitol in recognition of AutoZone’s continued investment in https://t.co/tjmWnmKWw3

This has allowed hardworking servers, baristas, and other tipped workers to keep more of what they earn. https://t.co/slKssoWP5E

Today, I toured the new Carroll County 911 Dispatch Center. I was honored to present an American flag flown over the U.S. Capitol in recognition of the dedicated dispatchers who serve Carroll County. I was honored to present Sheriff Riles with an American Flag flown over the U.S. Capitol in recognition of his commitment to public service and the people of Fayette County. https://t.co/ScDffOM8z4

I met with Haywood County Sheriff Billy Garrett to thank him for his years of law enforcement service to West Tennessee.

It was an honor to present him with an American Flag flown over the U.S. Capitol in recognition of his service and dedication to the people of Haywood County. https://t.co/peBH09ui6s

Today, I visited Scott Rhea with Rhea Farms in Fayette County. I was proud to present Scott with an American Flag that was flown over the U.S. Capitol to recognize the work he does every day to help feed this country.

Farmers like Scott are the backbone of this nation. Thank you https://t.co/F7E0xbLkHT

One year ago, the One Big Beautiful Bill delivered meaningful tax relief to workers through No Tax on Overtime. 🇺🇸

This has allowed hardworking Americans to keep more of what they earn. https://t.co/PXJkg9iWq8

I am grateful to Chief Tommy Gately, https://t.co/YLyV5JFL0e

Thank you to TWRA Officers Sam Stewart and Jeff Peach, Lieutenant Tim Ward, and https://t.co/8aPA2XyEEv

This bill delivered on @HouseGOP’s promise to provide meaningful tax relief for hardworking Americans! https://t.co/Yxs5ir0ihp

Thank you to CEO Adam Putnam for your leadership and dedication to https://t.co/LosqcAhHdY

Happy Independence Day! 🇺🇸

Today, as we celebrate 250 years of freedom, we honor the birth of our nation and the ideals of Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness! 

Roberta and I are wishing everyone a safe and happy Fourth of July! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/xXYwpAkNVW

I joined @LauraIngle on @NewsNation to discuss the current situation with Iran.

History shows Tehran has repeatedly lied and tested the limits during negotiations. @POTUS knows we must remain firm in any diplomatic effort. Peace through strength is the only path forward. https://t.co/breUeVUewb

Earlier this week, I was invited to the @WhiteHouse Rose Garden with my @HouseGOP colleagues to celebrate America’s 250th birthday! 🇺🇸

Thank you, @POTUS, for bringing us together to honor this historic milestone. https://t.co/Xdz9b5MNOu

I joined @iamditch and @MyTimVanHorn on @NewsTalk989 to discuss the status of the SAVE America Act. 

A strong majority of Americans support its passage, and the Senate should move the bill forward. https://t.co/mBFuN4KXMW

During a @WaysandMeansGOP Committee hearing on the growing sports industry, I asked former NFL Players Association Vice President and ESPN football analyst @TheSamAcho about financial literacy in the Name, Image, and Likeness (NIL) era.

I also highlighted the work the University https://t.co/GARQqXPLJA

This Saturday, America turns 250 years old. 🇺🇸

For 250 years, Americans have continued to fight for the freedoms that define our nation. https://t.co/K5VTmVKBpO

.@HouseGOP took an important step by passing the SAVE America Act to strengthen election security. 🇺🇸

It’s time for the Senate to move it forward so it can reach @POTUS’s desk and become law. https://t.co/dQwQETGuL1

I joined @BiancaDLGarza on @Newsmax to discuss my bill, the Cell Phone Jamming Reform Act.

The DOJ indicted 12 individuals tied to a drone smuggling ring that transported contraband cell phones into prisons. My bill helps end illegal cell phone use behind prisons walls. https://t.co/upQ7QA45k6

The Supreme Court ruling on Title IX affirms an important principle: fairness in women’s sports matters. For decades, female athletic categories have existed to ensure that women and girls have opportunities to compete and succeed.

I applaud the Supreme Court's decision to https://t.co/0RUSugOTRY

🚨📵 A massive drone smuggling ring was just busted after making drops at 10 federal prisons across multiple states, including here in Tennessee.

Contraband cell phones are a serious public safety threat. They allow dangerous inmates to coordinate crimes and facilitate escape https://t.co/fScBDrzI3O

🇺🇸 U.S. manufacturing just hit the highest levels since 2022! 

@HouseGOP made it happen through the One Big Beautiful Bill:

✅Restoring 100% expensing for new equipment

✅Incentivizing R&D

✅Making it easier to build factories here at home https://t.co/P6jUvyjuPo

I had a great time at the St. Louis Catholic Church Hole-In-One Charity Festival in Shelby County. Thank you to my friends, Jeff McEvoy and Wes Kraker, for the warm welcome. 

It was good to see many members of the community supporting a great cause. https://t.co/sMKq9iTB7L

🎨 It was great visiting with this year’s winner of the Congressional Art Competition, Tammy Le, and her family from Shelby County. 

Tammy’s artwork will be displayed in the U.S. Capitol for the next year, where it will be seen by visitors from across the country. https://t.co/qN22ooit9V

I joined @WolfBlitzer on @CNN to discuss the work that POTUS has done to bring Iran to the negotiating table.

Let’s be clear: Iran has a long track record of making promises it doesn’t keep. With @POTUS’s leadership, Tehran knows there will be consequences. https://t.co/KUjeJMVQs9

It was great meeting with @TNTDOC1 Commissioner Frank Strada.

Thank you for your leadership across the State of Tennessee and for your commitment to public safety. https://t.co/CraTigwYb9

It was great meeting with @SylvamoCo’s CEO John Sims from Memphis. 

Thank you for creating good jobs and for investing in our community! https://t.co/JJPElwGR1k

.@POTUS has degraded Iran’s military capabilities and forced them to the negotiating table.

America is leading on the world stage once again.

Thank you @Greta & @NEWSMAX for having me on! https://t.co/CX8lVMUunN

🚨Behind the scenes at the studio with @Greta! I’ll be joining her on @NEWSMAX shortly!

Going live soon! https://t.co/Upe6or6ijJ

🇺🇸 @POTUS should have every tool available to negotiate from a position of strength and advance our goals in the Middle East.

With talks ongoing and oil prices falling, we can’t afford to lose this momentum.

Peace through strength works. https://t.co/TKu1lNwwG8

It was great meeting with Memphis Allies to discuss their efforts to combat violent crime and strengthen communities across Memphis.

Thank you to Executive Director Susan Deason, Mike Keeney, and Shelby County Commissioner @mickwright for your leadership and commitment to making https://t.co/2QeQb0gWWe

The American people deserve a government that spends taxpayer dollars responsibly.

That’s why I voted YES on the Fraud Prevention and Accountability Act. 

I’ll keep fighting to eliminate waste, fraud, and abuse across the federal government. https://t.co/EClPtj5BBq

Happy Father’s Day! Being a dad to my two children will always be one of my greatest joys.

Roberta and I hope all the fathers across West Tennessee have a great day. https://t.co/sJ0tkvAP5O

Thanks to @POTUS and @HouseGOP, our border is secure! 🇺🇸

Under this administration, illegal border crossings have fallen to 55-year lows! https://t.co/3DBqUHFipb

It was great touring the @SouthwestTN Community College facilities in Shelby County.

Thank you to President Dr. Tracy Hall and Chief Government External Relations Officer Chuck Thomas for taking the time to show me around and for providing students an educational path to https://t.co/OX5Mt5ZvVH

It was great touring the new @TNVeteransHomes in Shelby County. This facility will provide care and support to our veterans in West Tennessee. 

Thank you to Executive Director Ed Harries and Board Chairman of Tennessee State Veterans’ Homes Hugh Lamar for the invitation. https://t.co/gIyMdaoi15

I joined @NationofJake on @NewsTalk989 to discuss the Memorandum of Understanding between the U.S. and Iran.

While negotiations are still ongoing, I remain confident that @POTUS will fulfill his promise and ensure that Iran never obtains a nuclear weapon. https://t.co/QYloMJPnHS

It was great meeting with Scotts Hill Mayor Woody Capley, Chief of Police Travis Dunavant, as well as Aldermen Bonnie Butler and Steve Dickson in Henderson County.

Thank you all for making Scotts Hill a good place to work and live. https://t.co/nxukHVKh9u

It was great meeting with Carroll County Mayor @JsphGBtlr and other county officials, including County Clerk Darlene Kirk, Veterans Service Officer Renee Myers, and the County Director of the Health Department, Emily Rushing.

Thank you all for your leadership, dedication, and https://t.co/Te85I51NLp

I met with Carroll County Sheriff Andy Dickson today and presented him with a certificate recognizing his dedicated service in law enforcement, including 16 years as Sheriff. 

Thank you for your service and dedication to Carroll County. https://t.co/nLmk0D3o4s

Happy Flag Day! 🇺🇸

Today, we remember the adoption of the United States flag on June 14, 1777.

For 249 years, the American flag has stood as a proud symbol of freedom, liberty, and the values that have shaped our nation. https://t.co/iR58h9yd69

Happy Birthday to President Donald J. Trump! 🇺🇸 
Thank you for your continued work, leadership, and dedication to putting America First!

Happy Birthday, @POTUS! https://t.co/GIhjVsjm4t

Happy 251st Birthday, @USArmy! 🇺🇸

Today, we celebrate 251 years of service to our nation! Thank you to the men and women whose dedication and sacrifice have helped safeguard American freedom. https://t.co/5DSLqipWxY

I spoke on the Floor of the House of Representatives to welcome Tennessee Valley Community Church Executive Pastor Carlton Gerrell to Washington, D.C.  Pastor Gerrell's ministry has changed the lives of many West Tennesseans, and his work continues to have a meaningful impact https://t.co/ADrxA52G80

The Memphis Safe Task Force announced that they’ve made more than 10,000 arrests, including 1,000 gang members! They have also located more than 150 missing children. 

I am grateful to @POTUS, @GovBillLee, and the law enforcement agencies working on the task force for making https://t.co/KM8wNPvREW

It was good meeting with @ABBGroupNews President and CEO Morten Wierod.

Thank you for providing jobs across Tennessee, including in Shelby and McNairy County. https://t.co/ftUdlqT7B6
